title: Weather Point Response
description: Schema for the Stormglass API weather point response. Contains hourly weather data from multiple sources and request metadata.

hours.description: Array of hourly weather data points

SourceValue.description: A weather parameter value from one or more data sources. Each key is a source abbreviation (e.g. noaa, dwd, sg).

WeatherHour.description: Hourly weather data for a single time interval

time.description: Timestamp in UTC for this data point

windSpeed.description: Speed of wind at 10m above sea level in meters per second

windDirection.description: Direction of wind at 10m above sea level. 0 degrees indicates wind coming from north.

gust.description: Wind gust in meters per second

pressure.description: Air pressure at sea level in hPa

precipitation.description: Mean precipitation in kg/m2/h (equivalent to mm/h)

waveHeight.description: Significant height of combined wind and swell waves in meters

waveDirection.description: Direction of combined wind and swell waves. 0 degrees indicates waves coming from north.

wavePeriod.description: Period of combined wind and swell waves in seconds

swellHeight.description: Height of swell waves in meters

swellDirection.description: Direction of swell waves. 0 degrees indicates swell coming from north.

swellPeriod.description: Period of swell waves in seconds

currentSpeed.description: Speed of ocean current in meters per second

currentDirection.description: Direction of ocean current. 0 degrees indicates current coming from north.

seaLevel.description: Sea level relative to Mean Sea Level in meters

MetaData.description: Metadata about the API request including quota information

cost.description: Number of API credits consumed by this request

requestCount.description: Total number of API calls made today

start.description: Start timestamp of the returned data

end.description: End timestamp of the returned data
